note: HP-stacking nuke carry. S1: on every stage-3 burst cast she gains ATK = 2.71% of her final Max HP for 10s; Beautiful (Max HP +1.6% x12 via her Decoy) is baked in as 2.71 x 1.192 = 3.23% (steady state after the ~36s ramp). Her charge-speed ramp (+100% after the first full charge until reload) is averaged to a permanent +80% (5 of 6 shots in each mag get it). S1's 136.6% per full-charge hit kept per shot. Burst: 1365.92% x 10 sequential hits + 28.9% x 12 Beautiful mirror = 14006% total flat. Decoy itself is defensive (skipped).
